note: Intended design: /gogo:xplan hosts a React board (ported from xplan: TONE palette, .wf-panel cards, native HTML5 DnD; dist/ committed, npm dev-time only) served by a python3 stdlib server; view opens pre-built pages; drag ready->changelog or select+mark-done POSTs a schema-v2 ship intent the orchestrator executes with the 0.8.0 synthesis writer (multiple = ONE merged entry), then the polling board refreshes live. /gogo:done becomes a plain filterable multi-select list with the same multiple=merge semantics; the 0.9.0 TUI is removed. As-is baseline (the TUI cockpit) in charts/before/.

diagrams.title: Intended: /gogo:xplan React board + simplified /gogo:done list -> one synthesis writer
